textAreas.label: Text
textAreas.text:
DEFINITIONS
ADEPT STARMAN TRAINING 
	A must complete training for all crewmates.
GUNNERY PRIVATE 
	A turret gunner reporting directly to the executive officer
GUNNERY SERGEANT 
	A main turret gunner with added responsibility of memorizing opponent ship component locations so he can make the main s7 turrets effective
GROUND INFANTRY 
	A team of ruthless FPS breach and assualt operators WEAPON SPECIALIST 
	A FPS operator with extensive knowledge of special weapons and their usability to enable the ground infantry to be deadly
LOGISTICS COORDINATOR
	A highly effective procurement starman responsible for bringing supplies/food/ammunitions on board the ship  ENGINEER
	A highly effective and knowledgable operator of their specfic station with basic combat training COPILOT
	A ship maintenance manager directly coordinating docking/repairs/guidance/navigations PILOT
	A dedicated specially trained pilot with high precision manuevering abilities specifically tuned to capital class ships EXECUTIVE OFFICER 
	A second in command and relay point of command from the CO mainly responsible for coordinating all sub teams
COMMANDING OFFICER 
	A Commander of the operation responsible for all planning out and scenario mapping  FLIGHT LIEUTENANT 
	A dogfight proven and trained pilot aimed at fighter combat in space/atmo
SQUADRON LEADER 
	A coordinator of multiple spacecraft in a squadron
WING COMMANDER 
	A manager and mentor for all fighter spacecraft, responsible for skirmishes and actual battle tactics
